sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports intermittent dizziness for one week, worse when standing. He denies chest pain, dyspnea, or syncope. The patient reported discomfort with scars.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal. The doctor took pictures of the scars today.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: Symptoms are most consistent with orthostatic dizziness. The patient has scars.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor recommends revisiting the scar in six months. The patient can keep using mederma scar gel twice a day. The patient can put scar gel on other scars. The patient should massage the scar gel. The doctor will revisit the scars in six months.
